interpretation: Non-IID baseline on FD001+FD003: 4 clients (2 per subset). Centralized RMSE=13.77, local-only mean RMSE=17.92±1.52, FedAvg RMSE=17.95. FedAvg closed -0.7% of the local-only → centralized RMSE gap while sharing only model weights. The per-subset breakdown reveals the asymmetry inherent to Non-IID training: local-only clients trained on one fault-mode family struggle on the other.
